name: Game1K
description: Game1K is widely known online as one of MultiCraft's top players. Starting in 2021, he has actively contributed to the PvP community. He is also the creator of the original tier list system.

name: TimmyLoal
description: TimmyLoal is a famous MultiCraft PvPer who climbed the leaderboards with his impressive skill in both Emerald and Dragonhide KB. However, he retired all of his tiers and quit MultiCraft in late 2025.

name: Verxsion
description: Verxsion is widely known online as one of MultiCraft's top players, just like Game1K. Starting in 2018, he became popular with his mobile skills back in the day as a Top PvPer. Nowdays he is on the leaderboard doing 2v20s, 1v20s, and many more.
